info.name: Multi-Currency Display — New & Updated Endpoints
info.description: All new currency management endpoints and updated public endpoints (scan, menu, cart, order). Import this alongside the main collection. Set the `token` variable after login.

request.description: Login and auto-save token to `{{token}}` collection variable.

List every currency in the system (active and inactive). No auth required. Frontend uses this to populate a currency selection dropdown.

**Response 200:**
```json
[
  { "id": 1, "code": "EGP", "name": "Egyptian Pound", "symbol": "ج.م", "is_active": true },
  { "id": 2, "code": "USD", "name": "US Dollar", "symbol": "$", "is_active": true },
  { "id": 3, "code": "EUR", "name": "Euro", "symbol": "€", "is_active": true }
]
```

Returns the full currency configuration for the authenticated merchant: base currency and all configured display currencies with their rates.

**Auth:** Bearer (owner)

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "base_currency_id": 1,
  "base_currency": { "id": 1, "code": "EGP", "name": "Egyptian Pound", "symbol": "ج.م", "is_active": true },
  "display_currencies": [
    {
      "id": 10,
      "currency_id": 2,
      "rate_from_base": 0.021,
      "is_active": true,
      "is_default_display": true,
      "created_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "currency": { "id": 2, "code": "USD", "name": "US Dollar", "symbol": "$", "is_active": true }
    }
  ]
}
```

**Response 500:** `{ "error": "..." }`

Set the merchant's base currency (source of truth for all prices). All item prices in the DB are assumed to be in this currency.

**Auth:** Bearer (owner)

**Body:**
```json
{ "currency_id": 1 }
```
- `currency_id` (int, required) — must exist in the currencies table and be active

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "merchant_id": 5,
  "base_currency_id": 1,
  "base_currency": { "id": 1, "code": "EGP", "name": "Egyptian Pound", "symbol": "ج.م" }
}
```

**Response 400:** `{ "error": "currency_id is required" }` or `{ "error": "Currency not found or inactive" }`

Add a display currency for the merchant with an exchange rate from the base currency.

**Auth:** Bearer (owner)

**Body:**
```json
{
  "currency_id": 2,
  "rate_from_base": 0.021,
  "is_default_display": true
}
```
- `currency_id` (int, required) — must exist in currencies table and be active
- `rate_from_base` (number, required) — how many display currency units equal 1 base unit. Must be > 0. Example: if base=EGP and display=USD, rate = 0.021 (1 EGP = 0.021 USD)
- `is_default_display` (bool, optional, default false) — if true, this becomes the customer's default currency. Automatically clears any previous default.

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "id": 10,
  "merchant_id": 5,
  "currency_id": 2,
  "rate_from_base": 0.021,
  "is_active": true,
  "is_default_display": true,
  "currency": { "id": 2, "code": "USD", "name": "US Dollar", "symbol": "$" }
}
```

**Response 400:** `{ "error": "currency_id and rate_from_base are required" }`
**Response 400:** `{ "error": "rate_from_base must be a positive number" }`
**Response 400:** `{ "error": "Currency not found or inactive" }`
**Response 400:** `{ "error": "This currency is already configured for this merchant. Use PATCH to update it." }`

Update an existing merchant display currency entry. Only send the fields you want to change.

**Auth:** Bearer (owner)

**Path param:** `mcId` — the `id` from the `merchant_currencies` table (not currency_id)

**Body (all optional):**
```json
{
  "rate_from_base": 0.0215,
  "is_active": true,
  "is_default_display": false
}
```
- `rate_from_base` — positive number, new exchange rate
- `is_active` — boolean, set false to temporarily disable this display currency without deleting it
- `is_default_display` — boolean, set true to make this the customer default (auto-clears previous default)

**Response 200:** updated `merchant_currencies` row

**Response 400:** `{ "error": "rate_from_base must be a positive number" }`
**Response 400:** `{ "error": "No valid fields to update" }`
**Response 404:** `{ "error": "Merchant currency entry not found" }`

Permanently remove a display currency from the merchant's configuration.

**Auth:** Bearer (owner)

**Path param:** `mcId` — the `id` from the `merchant_currencies` table

**Response 200:** `{ "success": true, "deleted_id": 10 }`

**Response 404:** `{ "error": "Merchant currency entry not found" }`

query.description: JWT token from scanned QR code

item.name: GET Menu By ID (with display prices)

query.description: Optional. Display currency ID (from currency_info.available_currencies). Omit to use merchant default.

request.description:
Place an order. Send the display currency the customer was viewing — this gets saved as a snapshot on the order (what they saw at checkout).

**Query:** `t` (JWT token, required)

**Body:**
```json
{
  "display_currency_id": 2,
  "items": [
    { "item_id": 100, "variant_id": null, "quantity": 2, "modifiers": [{ "modifier_id": 301, "quantity": 1 }] }
  ]
}
```
- `display_currency_id` (int, optional) — the currency_id the customer was viewing. Falls back to merchant default if omitted or invalid. This is saved as a snapshot and does NOT affect real pricing.
- `items` (array, required) — same format as before.

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "order_id": 999,
  "order_number": "1005",
  "status": "placed",
  "total_price": 320,
  "display_total_price": 6.72,
  "display_currency_id": 2,
  "display_exchange_rate": 0.021
}
```

**Response 400:** various validation errors (same as before)
No currency_id is sent. Backend falls back to the merchant's default display currency. If no default is configured, falls back to base currency with rate=1 (so display_price = base_price).

query.description: Non-existent currency ID — should fallback gracefully

request.description: An invalid currency_id (not in merchant's active display currencies). Backend falls back to merchant default. Never returns an error — always graceful.

item.name: [Scenario] currency_id = base currency → rate=1, prices unchanged

query.description: Set currencyId to the merchant's base_currency_id — display_price should equal base_price

request.description: When the selected currency equals the merchant's base currency, the rate is forced to 1 regardless of any rate_from_base entry. display_price will equal base_price.
Order placed without display_currency_id. Backend uses merchant default display currency. display_total_price in response will reflect the default currency.
